questions.question: What is the value of the combinatorial coefficient C(5, 2)?
How many distinct subsets can be formed from a set containing 5 elements?
Which principle is also known as the Dirichlet Box Principle?
Which logical connective represents an 'exclusive or' (XOR)?
answers: At least one input is true

questions.question: What is the negation of the statement 'All primes are odd'?
answers: There exists at least one prime that is not odd

questions.question: If P is true and Q is false, what is the truth value of the implication P -> Q?
If events A and B are independent, what is P(A and B)?
What is the sum of probabilities of all possible mutually exclusive outcomes in a sample space?
What is the probability of flipping a fair coin three times and getting all heads?
